name: rldyour-mcps
description: Controlled rldyour MCP server set for Codex with explicit runtime, startup, browser capability, and safety rules.

interface.shortDescription: Approved MCP servers used by the owner in Codex
interface.longDescription: This plugin connects the owner's approved MCP server set for Codex: Serena, Sequential Thinking, Playwright, Chrome DevTools, Context7, DeepWiki, Grep by Vercel, Semgrep, shadcn, Dart/Flutter, and Figma. Playwright MCP runs headless with network, storage, testing, and devtools capabilities enabled for full browser validation workflows. The plugin does not define global agent behavior and does not store secrets. It is responsible only for MCP transport configuration; specialized skills, memory policies, security rules, and workflow commands belong in separate plugins. User-facing conversation remains Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right MCP for this task.
Check MCP availability without writing data.
